Ouchies! That hurt.\nHold S while hitting the ground\nfrom heights to roll.

Our crusade for territory is far from over and we have recently obtained intel of a peculiar set of towers... of course, captured by our enemy.
You will need to go through these towers and clear them out for capture, revaluation and renovation, but beware.
The structure of the towers don't follow the standard building structures, in fact, they're highly irregular.
What is inside those towers and how they were made, is both a mystery to us, and something to be careful about.
Stay careful and observant and watch where you move, and who you fight.
This is the beginning of the corporate war, and we will not be stomped out.
Good luck.
